reason: Slice 54 made score calibration page-profile aware by requiring page_profile expectations and adding risk_score and confidence_score bounds. The stale high-volatility Cline baseline deliberately moves from low risk to medium risk because the scoring model now adds active freshness pressure for high-volatility tool profiles.
expected_effect: Gold-set calibration should keep all 9 real-route cases passing while detecting page profile drift, risk score drift, confidence score drift, and high-volatility stale-tool risk regressions.
